$comment: ⚠️  SECURITY CRITICAL - DO NOT MODIFY WITHOUT REVIEW. This schema validates incoming MQTT messages and protects against malformed or malicious data. Changes must be coordinated across all validation layers (server MQTT validator, device validator, API specs).
title: Metrics Command
description: Command to enable/disable metrics publishing from device

enabled.description: Whether metrics publishing should be enabled

frequency.description: Metrics publish frequency in seconds (optional, device may use default)

sessions.description: Specific metric sessions to enable (optional, default: all)
